title: Two and a Half Buttons — Daniel Fox
meta_description: A person holds several versions of themselves at once: a need, an identity, a value. Touch enough of those at the same time and the person feels met. Music is one of those buttons, sometimes only half of one.

schema.headline: Two and a Half Buttons
schema.description: A shopper carries a need, an identity, and a value at the same time. Touch enough of them at once and they feel met. Music is one of those buttons, sometimes only half.
